mdSummary:
# Calendar

Date picker calendar grid with single, range, and multi-select modes.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Lists & Trees
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/calendar

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Calendar | Value | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| Calendar | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` |  |
| Calendar | MinDate | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| Calendar | MaxDate | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| Calendar | IsRange | `bool` | `` |  |
| Calendar | RangeStart | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| Calendar | RangeStartChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` |  |
| Calendar | RangeEnd | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| Calendar | RangeEndChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` |  |
| Calendar | NumberOfMonths | `int` | `1` |  |
| Calendar | ShowWeekNumbers | `bool` | `` |  |
| Calendar | ShowYearPicker | `bool` | `` |  |
| Calendar | InitialView | `string` | `"Days"` |  |
| Calendar | IsDateDisabled | `Func<DateTime, bool>?` | `` |  |
| Calendar | DateClass | `Func<DateTime, string>?` | `` |  |
| Calendar | FirstDayOfWeek | `DayOfWeek` | `DayOfWeek.Sunday` |  |
| Calendar | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Calendar | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
